headline: Globe Life (GL): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Over the past six months, Globe Life has been a great trade, beating the S&P 500 by 19.4%. Its stock price has climbed to $178.90, representing a healthy 26.2% increase. This run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.
